notes.body: SCAM ALERT: Callers posing as Uber with 'connectivity issues' are asking for store email + login. No one from ownership, corporate, or a vendor calls for login info. Post the email and brief every cashier + MOD to hang up and report.
Short temp — 7/16 missed the 5PM Time & Temp and Closing Checklist (Madison Cureton, PM). Coach on close-out temps + checklist.
Celebrations: Sales Growth! Matthew & New Albany +73% WTD, Joe & Lafayette +39% WTD. So many up double digits. 2065 +30.3% WTD.
Upload deposit receipts to the portal — 2065 owes 7/10 and 7/14.
Manager Certifications 2065 complete — Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98. Temporary certificates issued; training videos fixed.
Register 2 not connecting to internet (R1 fine). Ticket 705671 open. Run on R1, follow up if not resolved by open.
Patty Press (wk of July 13): July Milestone Work Anniversaries; Coke Right-Sizing reminder.
